title: Runtime Validation, Parsing, and Trust Boundaries · Transfer Build
summary: Parse API, storage, URL, form, and message values into trustworthy domain records without unsafe casts. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a runtime-validated public data adapter with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Receive external JSON, storage, DOM, environment, and message data as unknown until evidence narrows it.
Build parsers that return typed values or structured failure paths rather than booleans that discard evidence.
Handle required, optional, deprecated, defaulted, and versioned fields with changed-schema fixtures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
